RICERCA E FILTRI" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="250" x="320" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cat2_txt" parent="cat2" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="• CMD: 'findstr' (ricerca testo)
• PS: 'Select-String' (il vero grep)
• VS Code: 'Ctrl+Shift+F' (GUI)

CONCETTI:
- GREP: Ricerca pattern in testo
- GLOB: Wildcard (*, **) per file
- RegEx: Espressioni regolari" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="230" x="10" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cat3" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1" value="3. • PS: 'Write-Host', 'cat', 'gc'
• VS Code: 'Editor visivo'

- Edit: Modificare il contenuto

- Operazioni base" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="734" y="890" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GsJ3d5wCoa1gR4jLSO1e-8" edge="1" parent="1" source="GsJ3d5wCoa1gR4jLSO1e-3" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=1" target="GsJ3d5wCoa1gR4jLSO1e-4" value="Esegue / Ospita"> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GsJ3d5wCoa1gR4jLSO1e-9" edge="1" parent="1" source="GsJ3d5wCoa1gR4jLSO1e-3" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=1" target="GsJ3d5wCoa1gR4jLSO1e-6" value="Esegue / Ospita"> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GsJ3d5wCoa1gR4jLSO1e-10" edge="1" parent="1" source="GsJ3d5wCoa1gR4jLSO1e-4" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#FF3333;fontStyle=1" target="GsJ3d5wCoa1gR4jLSO1e-6" value="Sostituisce ed Evoluzione di"> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="htc5Ua9bPUF9Pip-vP3Z-1" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;startSize=23;collapsible=0;" value="TEORIA: LA SHELL (IL GUSCIO)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="370" x="404" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="htc5Ua9bPUF9Pip-vP3Z-2" parent="htc5Ua9bPUF9Pip-vP3Z-1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="La Shell è l'INTERPRETE che traduce i tuoi comandi per il KERNEL.

• UTENTE: Scrive il comando (es. 'ls')
• SHELL: Capisce l'ordine e lo invia al Kernel
• KERNEL: Muove l'hardware (Disco, RAM) per darti il risultato.
